div.t-esc: ''.join([part[0] for part in user.name.split() if part][:2]).upper()

div.style: display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;

div.p: Manage company vehicles and transportation logs

div.style: display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;

div.p: Track operator licenses, safety scores, and availability
Monitor delivery runs, cargo limits, and ETAs

t.t-foreach: drivers_list.filtered(lambda d: d.status == 'available' and d.safety_status == 'available' and not d.is_expired)

div.style: display: none; background-color: #fef2f2; border: 1px solid #fee2e2; border-radius: 8px; padding: 0.75rem; color: #b91c1c; font-size: 0.8125rem;
display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1rem; max-height: 480px; overflow-y: auto;
border: 1px solid var(--border-color); border-radius: 10px; padding: 1rem; background-color: #f8fafc; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.5rem;
display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;
display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-top: 0.25rem;
display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.5rem; margin-top: 0.5rem; border-top: 1px dashed var(--border-color); padding-top: 0.5rem;

div.p: Track repairs, schedules, and maintenance costs

div.style: display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;

div.p: Review fuel logging and operational aggregations

div.style: background-color: #f8fafc; border: 1px solid var(--border-color); border-radius: 10px; padding: 1.25rem; margin-top: 1.5rem; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;

div.p: Real-time visualizations of logistics and resource efficiency

div.style: display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; height: 220px;
display: flex; justify-content: space-around; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; color: #64748b; margin-top: 1rem;
display: flex; align-items: flex-end; justify-content: space-between; height: 220px; padding: 0 1rem;
display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; width: 12%;
height: 60px; width: 100%; background: linear-gradient(to top, #3b82f6, #60a5fa); border-radius: 4px;
display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; width: 12%;
height: 100px; width: 100%; background: linear-gradient(to top, #3b82f6, #60a5fa); border-radius: 4px;
display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; width: 12%;
height: 140px; width: 100%; background: linear-gradient(to top, #3b82f6, #60a5fa); border-radius: 4px;
display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; width: 12%;
height: 180px; width: 100%; background: linear-gradient(to top, #f59e0b, #fbbf24); border-radius: 4px;

div.p: Configure system settings and review access control permissions
